#  View Specification Area (iOS) 
##### Tip
A new [two and three-column layout](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-layouts-are-available-for-ipad) is now available for iPads, making it easier to navigate different tools. Tap the **menu** ![Icon Ipad Menu](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/2wyHOqBLAvCO7klaHLXZzj/5f9e5da4183e99ab1ef8a7ee2530d1b0/icon_ipad_menu.png?fm=webp&h=24) icon to show and hide the tools menu.
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/permissions)
  * **Additional Information** :
    * You can only enable 'Specifications by Area' using the Procore Web app. Once you enable or disable it, your Procore iOS Mobile app will automatically sync.
    * To see the **Areas** button, 'Specification by Area' must be enabled for the project. See [Enable or Disable Specification Area](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/enable-or-disable-specification-areas) and [Add Specification Area](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/add-a-specification-area).


##  Steps 
  1. Open the **Procore** app on an iOS mobile device.
  2. Tap the project's **Specifications** tool.
  3. Tap the area you want to view.  
_Note_ : After you select an area, you will only see specifications within that area.


## See Also
  * [Download Specifications (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-ios/tutorials/download-specifications-ios)
  * [View Specifications (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-ios/tutorials/view-specifications-ios)
  * [What are the computer and mobile hardware requirements for Procore Models?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-are-the-computer-and-mobile-hardware-requirements-for-procore-models)
title: View Specification Area (iOS)
description: How to view specifications by area in the Specifications tool on the Procore iOS app.
